attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
ELIMINATION_ID,
ASSET_ID,
BOOK_TYPE,
PERIOD_NAME,
MONTHLY_COUNTER,
ASSET_EVENT,
ELIM_AMOUNT,
REMAINING_AMOUNT,
DEPRECIATION_TO_DATE,
DEPARTMENT,
COMPANY,
CAT_SEGMENT1,
CAT_SEGMENT2,
JE_HEADER_ID,
COGS_AMOUNT,
ASSET_COST,
ASSET_ORIG_COST,
ASSET_COST_USD,
ASSET_ORIG_COST_USD,
ASSET_ACCOUNT,
DEPR_ACCOUNT,
DEPRN_AMOUNT,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
LAST_UPDATED_BY,
CREATED_BY,
CREATION_DATE,
LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN,
FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY,
CONVERSION_RATE,
DEPRN_RESERVE_ACCT
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_FA_MNTHLY_ELN ST
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
SEL 1 FROM
  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET NFA
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT NFAC 
ON NFAC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE  = ST.DEPRN_RESERVE_ACCT
WHERE NFA.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM = TRIM(CAST(ST.ASSET_ID AS INTEGER)))
 OR NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM  $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS EL 
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON  NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EL.GLOBAL_NAME
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSB
ON NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NSB.SS_CODE
AND NSB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EL.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET NFA
ON   NFA.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM = TRIM(CAST( ST.ASSET_ID AS INTEGER))
AND    NFA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  =    NSB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND NFA.BK_COMPANY_CD  =    ST.COMPANY
WHERE    EL.BOOK_TYPE_CODE = ST.BOOK_TYPE
)

SEL
BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD
,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT
,BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT
,BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM
,BK_COMPANY_CD
,SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,BK_ASSET_EVENT_LIFE_CYCLE_CD
,SUM(ELMNTN_DPRCTN_USD_AMT) AS ELMNTN_DPRCTN_USD_AMT
,MAX(REMAINING_USD_AMT  )  REMAINING_USD_AMT
,MAX(DV_ELIMINATION_USD_COST  ) DV_ELIMINATION_USD_COST
,COGS_USD_COST AS   COGS_USD_COST
,MIN(DEPRECIATION_DT_USD_AMT) DEPRECIATION_DT_USD_AMT
,MIN(DEPRECIATION_DT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT) DEPRECIATION_DT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
,SUM(ELMNTN_DPRCTN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT) ELMNTN_DPRCTN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,MAX(DV_ELIMINATION_FUNCTIONAL_COST) DV_ELIMINATION_FUNCTIONAL_COST
,DPRCTN_RESERVE_FIN_ACCT_CD DPRCTN_RESERVE_FIN_ACCT_CD
,BK_DEPARTMENT_CD
,MAX(DV_ELIMINATION_NBV_USD_AMT) DV_ELIMINATION_NBV_USD_AMT
,MAX(DV_ELIMINATION_NBV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT) DV_ELIMINATION_NBV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,MAX(REMAINING_FUNCTIONAL_AMT   ) REMAINING_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
,EDW_CREATE_DTM
,EDW_CREATE_USER
,EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,EDW_UPDATE_USER
,ACTION_CODE
,DML_TYPE
FROM
(SELECT
RFM.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD,
EXTRACT(YEAR  FROM TO_DATE(ST.PERIOD_NAME ,'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))  AS    BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT,
RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT   BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT     ,
COALESCE(ST.ASSET_ID ,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM,
COALESCE (ST.COMPANY , 'UNK') BK_COMPANY_CD,
COALESCE (NSB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,-999) SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
COALESCE( ST.ASSET_EVENT , 'UNKNOWN') BK_ASSET_EVENT_LIFE_CYCLE_CD,
ST.ELIM_AMOUNT  AS ELMNTN_DPRCTN_USD_AMT,
ST.REMAINING_AMount  AS  REMAINING_USD_AMT,
CASE	WHEN ST.ASSET_EVENT = 'ADDITION' THEN 0.0000 WHEN ST.ASSET_EVENT = 'DEPRECIATION' OR ST.ASSET_EVENT = 'RETIREMENT' THEN
(ST.COGS_AMOUNT-ST.ASSET_ORIG_COST_USD)   	WHEN ST.ASSET_EVENT = 'ADJUSTMENT'   THEN  REMAINING_USD_AMT END  AS DV_ELIMINATION_USD_COST,
ST.COGS_AMOUNT AS COGS_USD_COST,
st.DEPRECIATION_TO_DATE AS  DEPRECIATION_DT_USD_AMT,
(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT * DEPRECIATION_DT_USD_AMT) AS DEPRECIATION_DT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
COALESCE (ST.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY ,'UNK')  AS FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD ,
(ELMNTN_DPRCTN_USD_AMT * MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT) ELMNTN_DPRCTN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
(DV_ELIMINATION_USD_COST * MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT)  DV_ELIMINATION_FUNCTIONAL_COST ,
COALESCE (ST.DEPRN_RESERVE_ACCT,0)  AS  DPRCTN_RESERVE_FIN_ACCT_CD,
COALESCE (ST.DEPARTMENT,0) AS BK_DEPARTMENT_CD,
(DV_ELIMINATION_USD_COST - DEPRECIATION_DT_USD_AMT) AS  DV_ELIMINATION_NBV_USD_AMT,
(DV_ELIMINATION_NBV_USD_AMT*MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT )  AS    DV_ELIMINATION_NBV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT * REMAINING_USD_AMT) AS REMAINING_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
NFA.EXPENSE_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY  AS  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' ACTION_CODE,
'I' DML_TYPE
FROM $$STGDB.ST_FA_MNTHLY_ELN ST
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT NFAC
ON   NFAC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = ST.DEPRN_RESERVE_ACCT
INNER JOIN (
SELECT   BOOK_TYPE_CODE,SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,GLOBAL_NAME
FROM       $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS) EL
ON   EL.BOOK_TYPE_CODE = ST.BOOK_TYPE
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EL.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSB
ON   NSB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EL.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NSB.SS_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFM
         ON   RFM.CALENDAR_YEAR_INT = EXTRACT(YEAR  FROM TO_DATE(ST.PERIOD_NAME,
                   'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
         AND RFM.CALENDAR_MONTH_NUMBER_INT             =EXTRACT(MONTH  FROM TO_DATE(ST.PERIOD_NAME,
                  'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
                           AND CAST (RFM.CALENDAR_DATE  AS DATE  ) = TO_DATE (ST.PERIOD_NAME , 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS' ) 
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET NFA
ON   NFA.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM = TRIM(CAST( ST.ASSET_ID AS INTEGER))
AND    NFA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  =    NSB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND NFA.BK_COMPANY_CD  =    ST.COMPANY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_MONTHLY_CONVERSION_RATE MCR
ON RFM.CALENDAR_YEAR_INT    = SUBSTR(TRIM(MCR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT), 1,4)
AND  RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = SUBSTR(TRIM(MCR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT), 5,6)
AND  MCR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CD = 'USD'
AND MCR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CD = ST.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY
)U
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,11,14,17,18,22,23,24,25,26 

UNION 

SEL
BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD
,BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT
,BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT
,BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM
,BK_COMPANY_CD
,SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
,BK_ASSET_EVENT_LIFE_CYCLE_CD
,SUM(ELMNTN_DPRCTN_USD_AMT) AS ELMNTN_DPRCTN_USD_AMT
,MAX(REMAINING_USD_AMT  )  REMAINING_USD_AMT
,MAX(DV_ELIMINATION_USD_COST  ) DV_ELIMINATION_USD_COST
,COGS_USD_COST AS   COGS_USD_COST
,MIN(DEPRECIATION_DT_USD_AMT) DEPRECIATION_DT_USD_AMT
,MIN(DEPRECIATION_DT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT) DEPRECIATION_DT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD
,SUM(ELMNTN_DPRCTN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT) ELMNTN_DPRCTN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,MAX(DV_ELIMINATION_FUNCTIONAL_COST) DV_ELIMINATION_FUNCTIONAL_COST
,DPRCTN_RESERVE_FIN_ACCT_CD DPRCTN_RESERVE_FIN_ACCT_CD
,BK_DEPARTMENT_CD
,MAX(DV_ELIMINATION_NBV_USD_AMT) DV_ELIMINATION_NBV_USD_AMT
,MAX(DV_ELIMINATION_NBV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT) DV_ELIMINATION_NBV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,MAX(REMAINING_FUNCTIONAL_AMT   ) REMAINING_FUNCTIONAL_AMT
,GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY
,EDW_CREATE_DTM
,EDW_CREATE_USER
,EDW_UPDATE_DTM
,EDW_UPDATE_USER
,ACTION_CODE
,DML_TYPE
FROM
(SELECT
RFM.FISCAL_CALENDAR_CODE BK_FISCAL_CALENDAR_CD,
EXTRACT(YEAR  FROM TO_DATE(EX.PERIOD_NAME ,'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))  AS BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUM_INT        ,
RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT   BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUM_INT     ,
COALESCE(EX.ASSET_ID ,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM,
COALESCE (EX.COMPANY , 'UNK') BK_COMPANY_CD,
COALESCE (NSB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,-999) SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY,
COALESCE( EX.ASSET_EVENT , 'UNKNOWN') BK_ASSET_EVENT_LIFE_CYCLE_CD,
EX.ELIM_AMOUNT  AS ELMNTN_DPRCTN_USD_AMT,
EX.REMAINING_AMount  AS  REMAINING_USD_AMT,
CASE	WHEN EX.ASSET_EVENT = 'ADDITION' THEN 0.0000 WHEN  EX.ASSET_EVENT = 'DEPRECIATION' OR EX.ASSET_EVENT = 'RETIREMENT' THEN
(EX.COGS_AMOUNT-EX.ASSET_ORIG_COST_USD)   	WHEN EX.ASSET_EVENT = 'ADJUSTMENT'   THEN  REMAINING_USD_AMT END  AS DV_ELIMINATION_USD_COST,
EX.COGS_AMOUNT AS COGS_USD_COST,
EX.DEPRECIATION_TO_DATE AS  DEPRECIATION_DT_USD_AMT,
(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT * DEPRECIATION_DT_USD_AMT) AS DEPRECIATION_DT_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
COALESCE (EX.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY ,'UNK')  AS FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY_CD ,
(ELMNTN_DPRCTN_USD_AMT * MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT) ELMNTN_DPRCTN_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
(DV_ELIMINATION_USD_COST * MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT)  DV_ELIMINATION_FUNCTIONAL_COST ,
COALESCE (EX.DEPRN_RESERVE_ACCT,0)  AS  DPRCTN_RESERVE_FIN_ACCT_CD,
COALESCE (EX.DEPARTMENT,0) AS BK_DEPARTMENT_CD,
(DV_ELIMINATION_USD_COST - DEPRECIATION_DT_USD_AMT) AS  DV_ELIMINATION_NBV_USD_AMT,
(DV_ELIMINATION_NBV_USD_AMT * MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT )  AS    DV_ELIMINATION_NBV_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
(MCR.PL_CONVERSION_RT * REMAINING_USD_AMT) AS REMAINING_FUNCTIONAL_AMT,
NFA.EXPENSE_GL_ACCOUNT_KEY  AS  GENERAL_LEDGER_ACCOUNT_KEY,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
'I' ACTION_CODE,
'I' DML_TYPE
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_FA_MNTHLY_ELN  EX
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT NFAC
ON   NFAC.BK_FINANCIAL_ACCOUNT_CODE = EX.DEPRN_RESERVE_ACCT
INNER JOIN (
SELECT   BOOK_TYPE_CODE,SET_OF_BOOKS_ID,GLOBAL_NAME
FROM       $$ETLVWDB.EL_FA_BOOK_CONTROLS) EL
ON   EL.BOOK_TYPE_CODE = EX.BOOK_TYPE
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC
ON (NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME = EL.GLOBAL_NAME)
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_SET_OF_BOOKS NSB
ON   NSB.SK_SET_OF_BOOKS_ID_INT = EL.SET_OF_BOOKS_ID
AND NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=NSB.SS_CODE
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFM
         ON   RFM.CALENDAR_YEAR_INT = EXTRACT(YEAR  FROM TO_DATE(EX.PERIOD_NAME,
                   'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
         AND RFM.CALENDAR_MONTH_NUMBER_INT             =EXTRACT(MONTH  FROM TO_DATE(EX.PERIOD_NAME,
                  'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS'))
                           AND CAST (RFM.CALENDAR_DATE  AS DATE  ) = TO_DATE (EX.PERIOD_NAME , 'MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS' ) 
INNER JOIN  $$FINLGLVWDB.N_FIXED_ASSET NFA
ON   NFA.BK_FIXED_ASSET_NUM = TRIM(CAST( EX.ASSET_ID AS INTEGER))
AND    NFA.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY  =    NSB.SET_OF_BOOKS_KEY
AND NFA.BK_COMPANY_CD  =    EX.COMPANY
INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.MT_MONTHLY_CONVERSION_RATE MCR
ON RFM.CALENDAR_YEAR_INT    = SUBSTR(TRIM(MCR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT), 1,4)
AND  RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT = SUBSTR(TRIM(MCR.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_NUM_INT), 5,6)
AND  MCR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CD = 'USD'
AND MCR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CD = EX.FUNCTIONAL_CURRENCY
)U
GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5,6,7,11,14,17,18,22,23,24,25,26
